LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter50_Standard.label: .50 cal bolter shell (Standard)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter50_Standard.description: A .50 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter50_Inferno.label: .50 cal bolter shell (Inferno)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter50_Inferno.description: A .50 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter50_Kraken.label: .50 cal bolter shell (Kraken)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter50_Kraken.description: A .50 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter50_Tempest.label: .50 cal bolter shell (Tempest)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter50_Tempest.description: A .50 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes bolters.
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter50_Standard.label: .50 cal bolt (standard)
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter50_Inferno.label: .50 cal bolt (inferno)
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter50_Kraken.label: .50 cal bolt (kraken)
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter50_Tempest.label: .50 cal bolt (tempest)
